title: Refresh root pack help and docs
summary: Makes shared core help and command docs root-pack-first while keeping externalized packs supported.
scope_items: Update host CLI help examples and pack-family wording
Update core-owned pack command docs and authoring reference
done_when_items: Shared help no longer implies packs/<slug> is the only supported pack root
Core-owned docs show first-party root packs as the default example topology
